funFact: Opens with green, watery, then settles into a green base built around tonka bean, sandalwood.

name: Dior Homme Sport 2021
funFact: A citrus scent that leans on woody, olibanum once the lemon, bergamot opening fades.

name: Boss Bottled Night
funFact: Known for its woody character, carried by woody, musk in the drydown.

name: Perfect
funFact: Starts bright with rhubarb, narcissus and finishes warm with cashmeran, cedar.

name: Armani Code Parfum
funFact: Opens with bergamot, bergamot leaf, then settles into a iris base built around tonka bean, cedar.

name: Good Girl Legere
funFact: A sweet scent that leans on dulce de leche, praline once the ylang ylang, mandarin orange opening fades.

name: Dior Homme Sport
funFact: Known for its citrus character, carried by lavender, rosemary in the drydown.

name: Viking
funFact: Starts bright with pink pepper, peppermint and finishes warm with vetiver, cedar.

name: Safari
funFact: Opens with galbanum, tagetes, then settles into a aromatic base built around vetiver, amber.

name: Red Jeans
funFact: A floral scent that leans on musk, vanilla once the peach, apricot opening fades.

name: Boss The Scent
funFact: Known for its citrus character, carried by leather, woody in the drydown.

name: Alien Eau de Toilette
funFact: Starts bright with citrus, mandarin orange and finishes warm with white amber, cashmeran.

name: Fuel for Life Homme
funFact: Opens with anise, grapefruit, then settles into a fruity base built around woody, heliotrope.

name: Escape
funFact: A aromatic scent that leans on oakmoss, musk once the melon, chamomile opening fades.
